versions.releaseNotes: Next Episode now works across seasons (S1E10 → S2E1) · Fullscreen Next Episode button stays visible · Screen stays awake during playback · Orientation locks to landscape in fullscreen, returns to portrait on exit · OTA updates enabled via EAS (channel: preview, runtime: 55.0.0) · New providers: ScreenScape, Nxsha · StreamGuide refactored to stable iframe · Cloudflare Workers backend with edge caching · Fixed React Hooks crash on detail screens · App icon updated
StreamGuide custom video player with seek optimization — smoother controls, performance improvements, enhanced playback experience.
Navigation bar overlap fixed — system nav bar no longer hides the bottom tab bar. Tab bar now uses safe area padding for proper positioning.
Blank screen on launch fixed — API URL now correctly points to production. App properly connects to live backend.
Initial release. Browse movies and TV shows, search, bookmark favorites, view trailers and streaming options.
